analysis_summary.title: Rescue and StopBleedout Event Handler Analysis

handlers.name: RescueHandler
handlers.description: Handles rescue skill to stabilize bleeding leaders on target tiles. Uses BleedOutTileEffectHandler.StabilizeLeader with removeEffect=true and playSound=true.

fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Reference to the Rescue skill effect configuration

handlers.name: StopBleedoutHandler
handlers.description: Handles StopBleedout skill. Similar to RescueHandler but includes visibility checks and target verification. Hidden if no adjacent tiles have BleedOutTileEffect.

fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Reference to the StopBleedout skill effect configuration

handlers.name: BleedOutTileEffectHandler
handlers.description: Core tile effect handler for bleeding out leaders. Manages countdown timer, visual indicators, and death/stabilization logic.

fields.description: Reference to the tile this effect is placed on
RoundCounter - increments each round, used to calculate remaining rounds
Unknown float parameter set in constructor
Reference to the template containing configuration and sounds
Reference to the bleeding leader unit
UI icon displayed in world space showing bleedout countdown
PreviousOccupiedState - stores tile's occupied state before effect was added

BleedOutTileEffectTemplate.description: Configuration template for bleedout tile effects

fields.description: InitialRounds - number of rounds before leader dies if not stabilized
TickSound - sound played each round when countdown decrements
StabilizeSound - sound played when leader is stabilized
DeathSound - sound played when leader dies from bleedout
BleedEffectTemplate - template for bleedout tile effects, used to find bleeding tiles

BaseUnitLeader.description: Unit leader entity that can bleed out

fields.description: HealthStatus - 0=Normal, 1=BleedingOut, 2=Stabilized
Contains reference at +0x10 to Actor for state updates
Statistics tracker for the unit
BleedRoundsRemaining - rounds until death, set from Template+0xb8

SkillEventHandler.description: Base class for skill event handlers

fields.description: Reference to the owning skill

key_discoveries.title: Rescue/StopBleedout Mechanism
key_discoveries.description: Both handlers work identically: they get the BleedOutTileEffectHandler from the target tile using TacticalConfig.BleedEffectTemplate (+0x78) as a key, then call StabilizeLeader to heal the bleeding unit.

key_discoveries.title: Health Status Enum
key_discoveries.description: Leader health status uses an enum: 0=Normal, 1=BleedingOut, 2=Stabilized. SetHealthStatus is called with value 1 when bleeding starts, 2 when stabilized.

key_discoveries.title: Bleedout Countdown
key_discoveries.description: The countdown is calculated as (Template.InitialRounds - Handler.RoundCounter). When this reaches 0 or below, the leader is killed via vtable call at +0x448.

key_discoveries.title: Mission End Behavior
key_discoveries.description: OnMissionPreFinished checks primary objectives state (2=success). If objectives succeeded, bleeding leaders are automatically stabilized. Otherwise they are killed.

key_discoveries.title: StopBleedoutHandler Visibility
key_discoveries.description: IsHidden returns true (skill hidden) if: no entity properties, entity is hidden, or no adjacent tiles (checked via 8 directions) have a BleedOutTileEffect.

key_discoveries.title: UI Icon Management
key_discoveries.description: A BleedingWorldSpaceIcon is created via UITacticalHUD.AddBleedingWorldSpaceIcon when bleedout starts. It's updated each round with the countdown number and removed when the effect ends.

key_discoveries.title: Sound System Integration
key_discoveries.description: Three sounds are defined in the template: TickSound (+0xbc) played each round, StabilizeSound (+0xc4) on rescue, DeathSound (+0xcc) when timer expires. All use Stem.ID.Play3D for positional audio.

key_discoveries.title: Tile Occupancy
key_discoveries.description: When bleeding starts, the tile's previous occupied state is saved to +0x40 and the tile is marked as temporarily occupied. On removal, the original state is restored.

BaseUnitLeader.0x448: Kill method - called when bleedout timer expires

Entity.0x388: GetAdjacentTiles method for StopBleedoutHandler visibility check
